# credential-isolation-patterns.txt — E100-S9 / TC-PUB-11 / TC-NFR-081-2
#
# Hardcoded credential patterns the audit will grep for in adapter source.
# Each line is a fixed string OR an extended regex (lines starting with `re:`).
# Comments start with `#`; blank lines ignored.
#
# These patterns are intentionally CONSERVATIVE — they target shapes that
# strongly indicate a real credential. False positives are preferred over
# false negatives at the audit gate.

# PEM-encoded private keys / certificates
-----BEGIN

# AWS access key prefixes (16-char tail intentional)
re:AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}

# GCP service-account JSON marker
"type": "service_account"

# GitHub personal access token prefixes
re:gh[pousr]_[A-Za-z0-9_]{36,}

# Generic literal credential assignments — `password=`, `passwd=`, `pwd=`
re:(password|passwd|pwd)[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*['\"][^'\"]{6,}['\"]

# Generic token literals — `token=<20+ alphanumeric>`
re:token[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*['\"][A-Za-z0-9._-]{20,}['\"]

# Generic secret literals — `secret=<20+>`
re:secret[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*['\"][A-Za-z0-9._-]{20,}['\"]
